feed.title: Using AI tooling for code review

entry.title: Using AI tooling for code review
entry.summary:
The email discusses the perceived value of using a CLAUDE.md file in programming practices. The author expresses skepticism about the utility of such files for review purposes, arguing that they seem more beneficial for coding tasks rather than for reviewing code or projects. This perspective suggests a preference for direct, practical tools and documentation that directly support the programming process rather than abstract or generic files that may not provide immediate value in reviewing or understanding code.
The focus is on the practical application and utility of documentation in the programming workflow. The author's stance implies a priority for efficiency and effectiveness in tools and documentation, suggesting that not all conventional or popular practices are necessarily beneficial in every aspect of programming, especially when it comes to code review processes. This viewpoint encourages a critical evaluation of tools and methodologies in programming to ensure they serve their intended purpose effectively.
